sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37828" key="e)pagkali/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαγκᾰλίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n37828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embrace,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Hp.Fract.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2123.tlg001:12:278" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.278</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
